test.name: Simple alert

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6119e29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61170a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61146db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611444322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114f6e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611513482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114b9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114ba183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a0de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a08588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a29d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611726785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61172facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611713634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6117137e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6116f7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Confirmation alert-accepting

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Confirmation alert-cancelling

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: Prompt alert-accepting

kw.name: Open Browser

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text Into Alert
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into an input field in an alert.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: WebDriverException: Message: target frame detached: received Inspector.detached event (failed to check if window was closed: disconnected: Unable to receive message from renderer) (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6119e29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61170a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61146db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61145bca5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61145ac2f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61145a43b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61145a0f1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611457d3b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611458482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611471de6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611514994] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114eff8a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611513b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114b9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114ba183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a0de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a08588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a29d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611726785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61172facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611713634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6117137e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6116f7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

test.name: Prompt alert-cancelling

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6119e29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61170a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff61146db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611444322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114f6e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff611513482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114b9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6114ba183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a0de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a08588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611a29d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611726785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61172facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff611713634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6117137e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6116f7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text Into Alert
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into an input field in an alert.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
